product: ServiceNow CMDB Identification and Reconciliation API
release: Australia release documentation on developer.servicenow.com; unversioned endpoint (latest)

query.sysparm_data_source: must name the discovery source of the payload

endpoint.anti_pattern: CMDB writes must NOT go through /api/now/table/cmdb_ci* — naive table inserts bypass identification and reconciliation rules; the harness rejects and counts any Table API request

auth.roles_note: the instance requires the itil or asset role; the harness only checks credentials

sys_object_source_info.source_native_key: stable unique key of the item in the source system

request_body.rules: every item carries className, a non-empty values object, and sys_object_source_info with source_name and source_native_key

items.operation: INSERT | UPDATE | NO_CHANGE | DELETE | UPDATE_WITH_DOWNGRADE | UPDATE_WITH_SWITCH | UPDATE_WITH_UPGRADE (absent/null on identification failure)
inputIndices: zero-based positions of the request items this result covers

response_body.ordering_rule: response items are NOT guaranteed to arrive in request order; the client must map results back to inputs via inputIndices

report_rules.order: ReconcileReport.Items is in request order (mapped via inputIndices)
report_rules.counts: Inserted/Updated/Unchanged tally the corresponding operations; Failed tallies items with errorCount > 0
report_rules.partial_success: a failed item never hides its successful siblings: their sysIds and operations are still reported and HasErrors is true
report_rules.identity: re-upserting an item with the same source_native_key keeps its sysId; unchanged values yield NO_CHANGE, changed values yield UPDATE

rate_limit.delay_argument: TimeSpan.FromSeconds(Retry-After) passed to the injected delay callback
rate_limit.rule: 429 is rejected-before-processing: await the injected delay and re-POST the same payload; after max_retries failed retries throw SnowRateLimitError with RetryAfterSeconds

error_envelope.client_rule: non-2xx responses (other than retryable 429) throw SnowApiError with StatusCode/Message/Detail from this envelope; credentials never appear in exception text
